idea-plugin.name: Hello Cat - AI Assistant
idea-plugin.description:
Hello Cat - Professional AI Coding Assistant

Hello Cat is an intelligent, user-friendly AI assistant integrated directly into your IntelliJ IDEA development environment. Designed with developers in mind, it provides real-time coding help, intelligent suggestions, and seamless integration into your workflow.

✨ Key Features

🤖 Advanced AI Integration
• Real-time streaming responses with natural typing animation
• Support for OpenAI GPT models and other compatible AI endpoints
• Smart fallback responses when AI services are unavailable
• Configurable API keys and model selection

🎨 Professional UI Design
• Clean, modern chat interface optimized for productivity
• Perfect message alignment (user right, AI left)
• Smooth rounded bubbles with content-based sizing
• Automatic scrolling during conversations

💻 Code-Focused Features
• Intelligent code block detection and formatting
• Inline code highlighting and syntax awareness
• Markdown support for headers, lists, and formatting
• Monospace font optimization for code readability

⚡ Developer Experience
• Keyboard shortcut (Ctrl+Alt+K) for quick access
• Toolbar integration with intuitive controls
• Sidebar tab for persistent chat sessions
• Auto-hide functionality to keep workspace clean
• Motivational quotes to boost productivity

🚀 Why Choose Hello Cat?

• Seamless Integration: Works alongside your existing tools without disruption
• Intelligent Context: Understands your coding environment and context
• Professional Grade: Built for serious development workflows
• Customizable: Configure AI endpoints, models, and behavior to match your needs
• Reliable: Graceful degradation when AI services are unavailable

Perfect for individual developers, teams, and anyone seeking an intelligent, responsive coding companion that enhances productivity without sacrificing professionalism.

action.description: Show or hide the Hello Cat assistant
